gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 approved the requirements-matrix/governance test diff with no findings; reviewer verified tests/test_project_governance.py passed.
verification: poetry run python -m compileall -q src tests -> passed
what_changed: Synchronized the V1 requirements matrix remaining release-gates checklist with the strict release-bundle artifact set.
Added a governance assertion that derives strict artifact labels from STRICT_V1_RELEASE_REQUIRED_ARTIFACTS and checks the matrix section.
why: The V1 requirements matrix is now bundled into strict releases, so its release-gated checklist should drift-fail when release_bundle.py changes.
